titleStmt.title: SII 9.633: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 633. (A.R. No. 449 of 1920.) ON A ROCK IN A FIELD TO THE SOUTH-EAST OF VELPUMADUGU, GOOTY TALUK, ANANTAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1470, Kīlaka, Kārtika, śu. 5 corresponding to A.D. 1548 October 7, Sunday (not verifiable), in the reign of Sadāśivarāyadēva-Mahārāya. It records that the Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Rāmarāja-Appayyadēva-Mahā-arasu fixed the rate of rent payable by the people of the village Apalapura for cultivating the fields at Velupaḍige which had been lying fallow and that he exempted them from bitti, birāḍa and other taxes. Velupaḍige is stated to have been situated in the Urvakoṇḍe-sīme which had been granted to Appayyadēva as amaranāyaka by the king.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī śubhamastu . svasti śrījayābhyudayaśālivāhanaśakavaruṣaṁgaḷu 1470 neya kīlakasaṁvatsarada kārttika śu 5 lu śrīmanmahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrāpratāpa śrīsadāśivarāyadēvamahārāyaru prutvīrājyaṁge
yiUtta yiralu śrīmaṁmāhamaṁḍalēśvara rāmarājaAppayyadēvamahāarasugaḷu velupaḍigeya holadoḷage paligrāmavāgi kaṭṭida Apalapurada gauḍasēnabōvaru vakkalu timmiṟaḍi muṁtāda samasta prajegaḷi
ge koṭa sāguvaḷiya śāṣanada kramaveṁtaṁdare sadāśivamahārāyaru namage Amaranāyakatanake pālisida Urvakoṁḍeya sīmege saluva velupaḍigeya grāmada holanu pāṁḍuva bīḷu bidu yiralāgi nāu nimage koṭa
sāguvaḷiya vivara �yo tātātiti Ārabhyavāgi bituvudu varuṣa 1 ke hola gutage Āgi koṭudu Ereya bījavari ¥ 1 kkegutage gaṁ jōḷa ¥ 0 . Oṁdu hoṁnu yibaḷa jōḷa maḍeya holada bījavari ¥ 1 ke cakra ga 3 ru mū
ru haṇa Eraḍaneya varuśake niṁta gutage yereya bījavari ¥ 1 ke ga 1 voṁdu varaha jōḷa ¥ 1 vokuḷa jōḷa maḍeya bījavari ¥ 1 ke ga 0 . Oṁdu hoṁnu yi mariyādelu yeraḍu yeṁdu yeṁdige tapade na
ḍasikoṁbeU �yo mariyādelū vevaśāyigaḷanu māḍi �yo śasanada pramāṇadalu Ācaṁdrāarkkastāyigaḷu Āgi sukadalu vevaśāyava māḍuvadu yi Apalapurakke kāṇike kapa biṭi birāḍa Urvakoṁḍe sīmege baṁda
danu yalavanu sarvamānyava māḍideU yi sāguvaḷiyanu mālayaḷagutageAgi naḍesikoṁbeU yiṣṭake naṁmanu sarvāta naṁbi sukadalu vevaśāyava māḍikoṁḍu yihudu yeṁdu koṭa śilāsāsana .
Digital edition of SII 9.633 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
